title: Packet 023 Test Artifact Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the validated Packet 023 one-file operations-web test artifact plus the minimal Packet 024 and Packet 025 authority-state surfaces through `C:/APEX Platform`, then restore clean parity on `/home/olares/code/apex` by reconciling the matching dirty tracked host file non-destructively, without mutating runtime, installing dependencies, or widening beyond the bounded publication set.
active_role: Olares Test Artifact Publication And Resync Operator
dependency_note: Packet 025 validated the exact Packet 023 one-file test artifact on the workstation without installs and preserved the mirrored diff locally. The host mirror still carries the same artifact as exactly one dirty tracked file. This packet may open only as a bounded publication and dirty-tracked-file resync lane.
required_inputs: Packet 025 execution handoff with successful local typecheck and browser-smoke evidence
Current workstation parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform`
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` git status showing the dirty tracked host file
constrained_outputs: A bounded publication commit containing only the validated one-file test artifact and the minimal Packet 024 or Packet 025 authority-state surfaces
A dated execution handoff recording publication scope, commit hash, host hash-equality evidence, and non-destructive host parity restoration
No runtime mutation, install work, package or lockfile mutation, production-source change outside the one validated test file, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Reconfirm the workstation implementation diff is limited to `apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` and matches the Packet 025-validated assertions.
Limit the publication set to the validated test file, the Packet 024 and Packet 025 authority surfaces, and minimal routing or roadmap updates only.
Exclude `.vercelignore`, secrets, runtime artifacts, generated artifacts, and unrelated workspace changes from the commit.
Publish the bounded parent-root commit to `clean-main` and record the resulting commit hash.
On `/home/olares/code/apex`, confirm exactly one dirty tracked file remains: `apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`.
Fetch the published commit on the host and prove the dirty tracked host file content is byte-identical to the published blob before clearing the dirty state.

If and only if the host file matches the published blob, use a file-scoped non-destructive restore to align the index or worktree to the published commit, then fast-forward-only synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex`.
Stop if the host file differs from the published blob, if additional host drift exists, or if resync would require force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, runtime mutation, or old-clone mutation.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes only a bounded publication and host parity restoration for the validated Packet 023 test artifact. It does not authorize database writes, runtime mutation, service changes, install work, package changes outside the bounded publication set, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, migration approval, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Complete. Packet 026 published the validated Packet 023 one-file operations-web test artifact and bounded authority surfaces in commit `79eeefee42246857fa455222931de0d068c1e9e8`, pushed `clean-main` to the moved GitHub URL without rewriting remotes, proved the dirty tracked host file blob matched the published blob `3e4234bfc248d11cd3b849304a355c983a3c1108`, then used a file-scoped restore and fast-forward-only merge to leave `/home/olares/code/apex` clean at `79eeefee42246857fa455222931de0d068c1e9e8`. `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remained untouched at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with its existing 30 status entries.
next_action: Open only the separate Packet 027 post-026 workstation-migration readiness reassessment. Do not treat Packet 026 as migration approval, and do not mutate runtime, change services, install dependencies, rewrite remotes, force, reset, clean, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, change canonical-hosting, or mutate the old clone from Packet 026 alone.
